idx_message_request_user_created_at_cost.name: idx_message_request_user_created_at_cost_stats
idx_message_request_user_created_at_cost.where: "message_request"."deleted_at" IS NULL AND ("message_request"."blocked_by" IS NULL OR "message_request"."blocked_by" <> 'warmup')

idx_message_request_provider_created_at_.name: idx_message_request_provider_created_at_active
idx_message_request_provider_created_at_.where: "message_request"."deleted_at" IS NULL AND ("message_request"."blocked_by" IS NULL OR "message_request"."blocked_by" <> 'warmup')

idx_message_request_session_id_prefix.name: idx_message_request_session_id_prefix
idx_message_request_session_id_prefix.where: "message_request"."deleted_at" IS NULL AND ("message_request"."blocked_by" IS NULL OR "message_request"."blocked_by" <> 'warmup')

idx_message_request_key_model_active.name: idx_message_request_key_model_active
idx_message_request_key_model_active.where: "message_request"."deleted_at" IS NULL AND "message_request"."model" IS NOT NULL AND ("message_request"."blocked_by" IS NULL OR "message_request"."blocked_by" <> 'warmup')

idx_message_request_key_endpoint_active.name: idx_message_request_key_endpoint_active
idx_message_request_key_endpoint_active.where: "message_request"."deleted_at" IS NULL AND "message_request"."endpoint" IS NOT NULL AND ("message_request"."blocked_by" IS NULL OR "message_request"."blocked_by" <> 'warmup')

idx_message_request_model_active.name: idx_message_request_model_active
idx_message_request_model_active.where: "message_request"."deleted_at" IS NULL AND "message_request"."model" IS NOT NULL

idx_message_request_status_code_active.name: idx_message_request_status_code_active
idx_message_request_status_code_active.where: "message_request"."deleted_at" IS NULL AND "message_request"."status_code" IS NOT NULL

idx_message_request_key_last_active.name: idx_message_request_key_last_active
idx_message_request_key_last_active.where: "message_request"."deleted_at" IS NULL AND ("message_request"."blocked_by" IS NULL OR "message_request"."blocked_by" <> 'warmup')

idx_message_request_key_cost_active.name: idx_message_request_key_cost_active
idx_message_request_key_cost_active.where: "message_request"."deleted_at" IS NULL AND ("message_request"."blocked_by" IS NULL OR "message_request"."blocked_by" <> 'warmup')

idx_providers_enabled_vendor_type.name: idx_providers_enabled_vendor_type
idx_providers_enabled_vendor_type.where: "providers"."deleted_at" IS NULL AND "providers"."is_enabled" = true AND "providers"."provider_vendor_id" IS NOT NULL AND "providers"."provider_vendor_id" > 0
